title: Does what Madam Bellinsky said come true?

meanings.usage: 指给人算命或预测未来的人
露天的商品交易或娱乐活动集会
指家庭成员或亲戚关系
算命者用来预测未来的工具
用帆布等搭建的临时住所
形容急切或缺乏耐心的样子
表示快速移动或匆忙做事
指把自己藏起来不让别人发现
指快速移动或匆忙行动

examples.en: I decided to visit a fortune-teller.
examples.zh: 我决定去拜访一位算命师。

examples.en: She looked into a crystal ball.
As soon as I went outside, I forgot all about Madam Bellinsky.
examples.zh: 我一走出帐篷，就把贝琳斯基夫人忘得一干二净。

examples.en: I forgot all about Madam Bellinsky.
examples.zh: 我把贝琳斯基夫人忘得一干二净。

examples.en: Your sister will be here in less than an hour.
examples.zh: 你姐姐不到一个小时就到了。

examples.en: She will lead you away from this place.
examples.zh: 她会把你从这个地方带走。

examples.en: She intends to stay for a few days.
As she walked away, I followed her.
examples.zh: 她走开时，我跟在她后面。

examples.en: We must be at the station to meet her.

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，强调动作的先后顺序
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时

examples.en: After I had given her some money, she looked into a crystal ball.
examples.zh: 我给她一些钱之后，她看向水晶球。

examples.en: After she had finished her work, she went home.

grammar.title: be going to 表示意图 (Future Intention)
grammar.definition: 表示已经计划好或决定好的将来意图
grammar.structure: 主语 + be going to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于表达主语已经决定要做的事情，带有计划性

examples.en: She intends to stay for a few days.
We are going to be at the station.

grammar.title: 时间状语从句 (Time Clause)
grammar.definition: 用连词引导的状语从句，说明动作发生的时间
grammar.structure: 连词 + 主语 + 动词
grammar.usage: as soon as, the moment, after, before 等引导时间状语从句，主句用一般将来时，从句用一般现在时

examples.en: The moment you leave this tent, you will get a big surprise.
examples.zh: 你一离开这个帐篷，你就会得到一个大惊喜。

examples.en: As soon as I went outside, I forgot all about Madam Bellinsky.
examples.zh: 我一走出帐篷，就把贝琳斯基夫人忘得一干二净。

sentencePatterns.pattern: A relation of yours is coming to see you.

original.en: A relation of yours is coming to see you.
original.zh: 你的一个亲戚要来看你。

imitations.en: A friend of yours is waiting for you.
A colleague of mine is traveling to London.
imitations.zh: 我的一位同事要去伦敦。

original.en: The moment you leave this tent, you will get a big surprise.
original.zh: 你一离开这个帐篷，你就会得到一个大惊喜。

imitations.en: The moment you open the door, you will see the gift.
imitations.zh: 你一打开门，就会看到礼物。

imitations.en: The moment he arrived, it started to rain.

sentencePatterns.pattern: After + 过去完成时, 主语 + 一般过去时

original.en: After I had given her some money, she looked into a crystal ball.
original.zh: 我给她一些钱之后，她看向水晶球。

imitations.en: After I had finished dinner, I watched TV.
imitations.zh: 我吃完晚饭后，看了电视。

imitations.en: After she had called me, I went to the office.
imitations.zh: 她给我打电话后，我去了办公室。
